metadata.title: Oxford English Primary 5 (Shanghai Edition)
metadata.subtitle: 牛津上海版小学英语五年级上册

unit1.name: New faces
unit1.topic: 学习描述新同学和老师

vocabulary.exampleSentence: He is very active in class.

unit2.name: Classmates
unit2.topic: 学习描述同学的特点和爱好

vocabulary.chineseSentence: 我所有的同学都很友好。

vocabulary.exampleSentence: My house is near the school.
Tom sits between Mary and Ben.
vocabulary.chineseSentence: 汤姆坐在玛丽和本之间。

vocabulary.exampleSentence: The cat is behind the door.
The teacher stands in front of the class.
vocabulary.chineseSentence: 老师站在全班同学前面。

vocabulary.exampleSentence: I sit in the first row.

unit3.name: School activities
unit3.topic: 学习学校活动和日常安排

vocabulary.exampleSentence: We have many activities at school.
We have four lessons in the morning.

vocabulary.chineseSentence: 你最喜欢的学科是什么？

vocabulary.exampleSentence: We sing songs in Music class.
We can dance in Music class.
vocabulary.chineseSentence: 我们可以在音乐课跳舞。

unit4.name: My neighbourhood
unit4.topic: 学习描述邻里和社区场所

vocabulary.exampleSentence: I live in a quiet neighbourhood.
vocabulary.chineseSentence: 我住在一个安静的社区。

vocabulary.exampleSentence: I buy food at the supermarket.
My mother works in a hospital.
I send a letter at the post office.
My father works at a bank.
I buy books at the bookshop.
The park is across the street.
My school is near the park.
My father is a bus driver.
My mother is a good cook.

unit6.name: Keeping healthy
unit6.topic: 学习健康生活习惯和饮食

vocabulary.chineseSentence: 我们应该吃健康的食物。

vocabulary.exampleSentence: I eat an apple every day.
I eat fish once a week.
I have an egg for breakfast.
We should do exercise every day.
I sleep eight hours every night.

unit7.name: Travelling
unit7.topic: 学习旅行相关词汇和表达

vocabulary.exampleSentence: I want to travel around China.

vocabulary.chineseSentence: 我们有一次愉快的旅行。

vocabulary.exampleSentence: Where did you go on holiday?
There are many museums in Beijing.
The Forbidden City is a famous palace.
I like playing on the beach.
I went to Beijing last summer.

unit8.name: Signs and rules
unit8.topic: 学习公共场所标志和规则

vocabulary.exampleSentence: I see a sign on the wall.
vocabulary.chineseSentence: 我看到墙上有一个标志。

vocabulary.exampleSentence: You must be quiet in the library.
You mustn't walk on the grass.
We must keep quiet in the library.
vocabulary.chineseSentence: 我们在图书馆必须保持安静。

vocabulary.exampleSentence: We should keep the classroom clean.
vocabulary.chineseSentence: 我们应该保持教室干净。

vocabulary.exampleSentence: Excuse me, where is the museum?
vocabulary.chineseSentence: 打扰一下，博物馆在哪里？

vocabulary.exampleSentence: Turn right at the traffic lights.
The shop is on the corner.
There is a lot of traffic.

unit10.name: The seasons
unit10.topic: 学习四季的特点和活动

vocabulary.exampleSentence: There are four seasons in a year.
Children like to make snowmen in winter.
vocabulary.chineseSentence: 孩子们喜欢在冬天堆雪人。
你最喜欢的季节是什么？

unit11.name: Plants and animals
unit11.topic: 学习动植物的特征和习性

vocabulary.exampleSentence: The leaf turns yellow in autumn.
The bird is in its nest.

unit12.name: Environmental protection
unit12.topic: 学习环保相关词汇和保护意识

vocabulary.chineseSentence: 我们必须保护野生动物。

vocabulary.exampleSentence: Many animals live in the forest.
Don't throw rubbish on the ground.

vocabulary.chineseSentence: 我们可以重复使用塑料袋。
